content.text: yes — mira has a confirmed **egg allergy** (mild hives), verified by your pediatric office, so that's the one to flag clearly to any new caregiver before they're ever in the kitchen or feeding her anything prepared. it's worth giving them a simple written note that says "no egg, including baked goods or foods with egg as an ingredient," since egg hides in a lot of things — pasta, some breads, sauces — and a new caregiver may not think to check. a good optional next step is to call Riverdale Pediatrics (evenings work for you) and ask whether they'd recommend keeping any reaction plan on hand for the caregiver, given her age and the fact that this is a confirmed allergy.
